de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.signanalysis

Class SignAnalysisLattice

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainLattice
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.signanalysis.SignAnalysisLattice
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    PartialComparator<AbstractDomainElement>, java.lang.Iterable<AbstractDomainElement>

    public class SignAnalysisLattice
extends AbstractDomainLattice
    A lattice for sign analysis of integers.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.PartialComparator

        PartialComparator.PartialComparisonResult

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static AbstractDomainElement[] ABSTRACT_DOMAIN_ELEMS
      All elements of this abstract domain.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static SignAnalysisLattice getInstance() 
      java.util.Iterator<AbstractDomainElement> iterator()
      Iterates through the abstract domain elements of this abstract domain starting by the smallest element; if an element b is returned by the iterator after an element a, then either compare(a,b) == LTE, or compare(a,b) == UNDEF must hold (i.e., b may not be smaller than a).
      AbstractDomainElement join(AbstractDomainElement elem1, AbstractDomainElement elem2)
      A lattice join operation; finds an abstract element that is the least upper bound of the set consisting of the elements a and b.

      • Methods inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.AbstractDomainLattice

        abstractFrom, compare, fromString, getSideConditionForAxiom

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

      • Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

        forEach, spliterator

    • Field Detail

      • ABSTRACT_DOMAIN_ELEMS

        public static final AbstractDomainElement[] ABSTRACT_DOMAIN_ELEMS
        All elements of this abstract domain.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static SignAnalysisLattice getInstance()
        Returns:
        The singleton instance of this lattice.

      • join

        public AbstractDomainElement join(AbstractDomainElement elem1,
                                  AbstractDomainElement elem2)
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainLattice
        A lattice join operation; finds an abstract element that is the least upper bound of the set consisting of the elements a and b.
        Specified by:
        join in class AbstractDomainLattice
        Parameters:
        elem1 - First element to find the least upper bound for.
        elem2 - Second element to find the least upper bound for.
        Returns:
        The least upper bound of the set consisting of the elements a and b.

      • iterator

        public java.util.Iterator<AbstractDomainElement> iterator()
        Description copied from class: AbstractDomainLattice
        Iterates through the abstract domain elements of this abstract domain starting by the smallest element; if an element b is returned by the iterator after an element a, then either compare(a,b) == LTE, or compare(a,b) == UNDEF must hold (i.e., b may not be smaller than a).
        Specified by:
        iterator in interface java.lang.Iterable<AbstractDomainElement>
        Specified by:
        iterator in class AbstractDomainLattice
